description: Attempt to register using a valid email address that is already linked to an account. Expected outcome: System displays a specific error message indicating the email address is already in use.
Fill out the Signup form with valid, unique Name and Email Address. Expected outcome: Successful account creation confirmation message appears, or the user is redirected to a welcome/account page.

Enter valid login credentials and click the Login button multiple times rapidly without waiting for the server response. Expected outcome: The system handles duplicate requests gracefully (e.g., displays only one success/failure message, or implements rate limiting).
Enter a valid email address into the unnamed subscription field and click submit. Expected outcome: A confirmation message appears indicating successful subscription/mailing list addition.

Enter a name or password string that matches the maximum allowed character limit (e.g., 256 characters) into the respective field and attempt submission. Expected outcome: The form accepts the input and proceeds with validation/submission without truncation or error.

scenario: Login with Special Characters in Password
description: Enter a valid email address and attempt to log in using a password containing special characters (e.g., !, @, #). Expected outcome: Successful login if the password matches the stored hash; failure otherwise.
